summary: Frontend-only review for iter132 (MoMo payment modal premium revamp to match Stripe checkout theme). Stripe checkout modal regression verified live via /orders -> Pay Now (screenshot). MoMo modal verified via thorough static code review of PaymentMethodsSelection.jsx lines 461-673, per the agent-to-agent fallback allowance (full /services/travel booking flow was not attempted to save cycles and the note explicitly permits static review). All 13 spec bullets PASS. All data-testids present. All required class tokens, colors (#c9a74a gold, #071d3c->#0a2e5c->#051530 navy gradient, emerald-400/red-400 status colors), compact size (w-screen h-screen sm:w-[64vw] sm:max-w-md sm:max-h-[80vh]), typography (text-xl sm:text-2xl title, text-2xl sm:text-3xl amount, text-[10px] eyebrow, text-[9px] amount-label, text-[11px] phone-label), and button sizes (h-9 text-xs outline, h-10 text-sm primary) match the Stripe checkout modal reference. Logic paths (initiateMoMoPayment, resetMoMoPayment, closeMoMoDialog gating, 5s poll cadence, maxPolls=24, state machine pending/completed/failed/timed_out/cancelled) are byte-for-byte preserved from prior iteration.

spec_verification_matrix.phone_input_card: rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-b from-white/[0.07] glass card, Label text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-slate-400 font-medium, Input data-testid='momo-phone-input' bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-[#c9a74a] focus:ring-[#c9a74a]/20 placeholder '237670000001' (lines 512-528) — PASS

spec_verification_matrix.status_icon_colors: getMoMoStatusIcon uses emerald-400 (completed), red-400 (failed/timed_out/cancelled), #c9a74a (pending/default), all h-10 w-10 — NO green-500/red-500/yellow-500/yellow-600 legacy colors (lines 228-240) — PASS

spec_verification_matrix.change_method_btn: data-testid='momo-change-method-btn', label 'Choose a different payment method' (NOT 'Cancel'), variant outline h-9 text-xs (lines 623-632) — PASS
spec_verification_matrix.request_payment_btn: data-testid='momo-request-payment-btn', label 'Request Payment', h-10 text-sm bg-[#082c59] hover:bg-[#0a346c] (lines 633-644) — PASS
spec_verification_matrix.continue_btn: data-testid='momo-continue-btn', emerald h-10 text-sm bg-emerald-600 (lines 646-658) — PASS
spec_verification_matrix.logic_request_to_pay: POST ${VITE_API_URL}/momo/request-to-pay with body {order_id, phone_number (whitespace stripped), payer_message, payee_note} (lines 168-180). NOTE: spec bullet mentions 'amount' in the body but the actual preserved code does not send amount — this matches the PRIOR iteration's behaviour (backend derives amount from order_id). Since the directive is LOGIC UNCHANGED, this is correct preservation — PASS
spec_verification_matrix.polling: useEffect on momoTransactionId polls GET /momo/status/{id} every 5s via setTimeout(checkStatus, 5000), increments momoPollCount up to maxPolls=24 (lines 35, 87-144) — PASS
spec_verification_matrix.stripe_regression: Stripe checkout modal still renders at compact size (1440x900 measured ~922w x 526h, 64vw/80vh caps respected, text-xl/sm:text-2xl heading, Continue to Stripe h-10 text-sm, Choose a different payment method h-9 text-xs) — verified live via /orders -> Pay Now screenshot — PASS
spec_verification_matrix.trust_footer: 'MTN MoMo is processed directly on your phone — we never see or store your PIN.' with emerald-400 CheckCircle icon, only rendered when !momoTransactionId (initial state), text-[10px] text-slate-400 (lines 663-670) — PASS

issues: Radix a11y warning pre-existing pattern: DialogDescription IS provided (line 489) so no warning expected here — unlike the Stripe modal flagged in iter131. Good.

Minor: the 'Sandbox Testing' hint block is developer-facing UX. Consider hiding it behind an env flag (import.meta.env.MODE !== 'production') so customers in prod don't see phone-ending test rules. Non-blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: File length: PaymentMethodsSelection.jsx is now 686 lines — just under the 700-line split threshold. Consider extracting the MoMo Dialog block (~210 lines) into a dedicated MoMoPaymentDialog.jsx since it owns its own state (momoPhoneNumber, momoTransactionId, momoStatus, momoPollCount) and could receive orderId/amount/onPaymentInitiated via props. Would pair nicely with StripeCheckoutModal.jsx already being a standalone component.

Polling effect (lines 87-144) uses setTimeout which only fires ONCE per effect invocation; the re-trigger depends on momoPollCount being in the deps array. This works but is subtle — a setInterval with explicit cleanup or a while-loop inside an async function guarded by a ref would be more obvious. Pre-existing behaviour, not part of this revamp's scope.

getMoMoStatusIcon default branch (line 239) returns a Smartphone icon in #c9a74a even when momoStatus is null — this is only reached when momoTransactionId is set but momoStatus hasn't arrived yet, which is a very brief window. Cosmetic only.

The Sandbox Testing hint card is unconditionally shown to all environments. In production this may confuse end-users ('Ending 1-5 → succeeds' looks like a gambling tip). Gate behind import.meta.env.MODE !== 'production' or a feature flag.
Trust footer (line 664) border-t border-white/10 is correctly using white-on-dark divider — good.

Spec bullet #9 mentions POST body should include 'amount' but the preserved code (line 174-179) doesn't send amount — backend correctly derives it from order_id on the server side. This is actually better (prevents client-side amount tampering). No action needed.
Accessibility: momo-phone Input uses htmlFor/id pairing (id='momo-phone') correctly. Good.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (13/13 spec bullets verified, Stripe regression PASS)

seed_data_creation: None — 8 pending+unpaid orders already seeded and visible on /orders.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To reach the MoMo Dialog end-to-end: login as customer@test.com -> /services/travel -> search a route (DLA->YAO, any date) -> pick trip -> fill passenger details -> Payment step renders the 3-tile PaymentMethodsSelection -> click MTN MoMo tile -> click Proceed to Payment (booking page sets triggerPayment=true) -> Dialog opens. Do NOT use /orders -> Pay Now — that goes straight to the Stripe checkout modal (StripeCheckoutModal inside StripeCheckoutConfirm), which bypasses the 3-tile chooser. Rate limiting: 60s+ cooldown between back-to-back login attempts (403s observed). Vite HMR is healthy; no supervisor restart needed for JSX edits.
rca of the issue: No bug to RCA — this was a visual revamp request and all spec bullets pass. Main agent can self-test by manually opening /services/travel booking flow once and visually comparing the MoMo modal to the Stripe modal screenshot (iter131).
